items.title: Vintage Magnalite GHC 12-Inch Cast Aluminum Skillet / Chicken Fryer
items.description:
Brand: Magnalite GHC (General Housewares Corp)
Model/Size: 12 Inches / 31 CM (Stated on bottom)
Material: Professional-grade cast aluminum/magnesium alloy.
Features: Heavy-duty construction with integrated helper handle and long stay-cool handle. Known for exceptional heat distribution.
Condition: Vintage, used condition. Shows carbon buildup on the exterior bottom and interior darkening/patina consistent with age. No deep pitting or major warping observed. No lid included.
Note: Perfect "user" piece for someone looking to restore a classic American kitchen staple. Great for gumbos, stews, and searing.
Pickup category timeslot {A}

items.title: Large John-Richard Designer Shell Centerpiece Bowl - 23"
items.description:
A stunning, large-scale sculptural shell bowl by luxury home brand John-Richard. This high-end designer piece features a contemporary two-tone metallic aesthetic, perfect as a dining table centerpiece or a mantle statement piece.
Brand: John-Richard (Authentic labeled piece, JRA-9049S2 LG).
Design: Deeply ribbed, stylized conch shell form with an organic, "global chic" silhouette.
Finish: Hand-applied brushed nickel/silver exterior with a contrasting, textured gold-leaf finish interior.
Material: Substantial cast composite/aluminum with metallic plating.
Size: Approximately 23" L x 12" W x 6" H (Large size).
Condition: Excellent condition with no visible chips or cracks. The interior texture is part of the intentional artisanal design. Felt-lined base for surface protection.
Pickup category timeslot {A}

items.title: Tesla Gen 2 Universal Mobile Connector (UMC) – Main Unit & Bag (Incomplete)
items.description:
This is an authentic Tesla Generation 2 Universal Mobile Connector (UMC), the portable charging solution for Tesla Model S, 3, X, and Y. This specific unit is the South Korean/International variant (Part No: 1475281-00-E), featuring the Type 2 connector common in KR and EU markets.

Condition: NotTested.

Physical State: Shows minor signs of surface wear from storage, but the cable and handle are in excellent structural condition. Includes original Tesla branded zippered storage bag.

Important Note-
This unit is INCOMPLETE. To use this charger, you will need to provide your own Tesla Gen 2 Wall Adapter (the "pigtail" cord that connects the main brick to a wall outlet).
This listing includes the Main Controller Brick, the attached 20ft (approx) vehicle cable, and the Storage Bag.
Missing: The wall-side plug adapter is NOT included.
Pickup category timeslot {A}
